creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: nemysis
Date: Sun Feb  2 00:20:09 2014
New Revision: 342228
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/342228
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r342228/

Log:
  - Bump PORTREVISION
  - Take maintainership
  - Remove leading article from COMMENT
  - Add license (GPLv2)
  - USES gmake instead of USE_GMAKE
  - Disable all warnings with -w
  - Support STAGEDIR
  - Add DOCS and Option
  - Add Desktop entry file
  - Add and symlink the icon
  - Recreate patches with make makepatch
  - Recreate pkg-plist with make makeplist
  
  PR:		ports/173880
  Submitted by:	nemysis (self)

Added:
  head/games/pipenightdreams/files/patch-src__eventmanager.cpp   (contents, props changed)
  head/games/pipenightdreams/files/patch-src__graphic.cpp   (contents, props changed)
  head/games/pipenightdreams/files/patch-src__hash.cpp   (contents, props changed)
  head/games/pipenightdreams/files/patch-src__image.cpp   (contents, props changed)
  head/games/pipenightdreams/files/patch-src__list.cpp   (contents, props changed)
  head/games/pipenightdreams/files/patch-src__pipe.cpp   (contents, props changed)
  head/games/pipenightdreams/files/patch-src__player.h   (contents, props changed)
  head/games/pipenightdreams/files/patch-src__pointer.cpp   (contents, props changed)
  head/games/pipenightdreams/files/patch-src__pointer.h   (contents, props changed)
  head/games/pipenightdreams/files/patch-src__score.cpp   (contents, props changed)
  head/games/pipenightdreams/files/patch-src__str.cpp   (contents, props changed)
Deleted:
  head/games/pipenightdreams/files/patch-eventmanager.cpp
  head/games/pipenightdreams/files/patch-graphic.cpp
  head/games/pipenightdreams/files/patch-hash.cpp
  head/games/pipenightdreams/files/patch-image.cpp
  head/games/pipenightdreams/files/patch-list.cpp
  head/games/pipenightdreams/files/patch-pipe.cpp
  head/games/pipenightdreams/files/patch-player.h
  head/games/pipenightdreams/files/patch-pointer.cpp
  head/games/pipenightdreams/files/patch-pointer.h
  head/games/pipenightdreams/files/patch-score.cpp
  head/games/pipenightdreams/files/patch-str.cpp
Modified:
  head/games/pipenightdreams/Makefile
  head/games/pipenightdreams/pkg-plist

Modified: head/games/pipenightdreams/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/games/pipenightdreams/Makefile	Sun Feb  2 00:17:35 2014	(r342227)
+++ head/games/pipenightdreams/Makefile	Sun Feb  2 00:20:09 2014	(r342228)
@@ -3,22 +3,29 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	pipenightdreams
 PORTVERSION=	0.10.0
-PORTREVISION=	11
+PORTREVISION=	12
 CATEGORIES=	games
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.libsdl.org/projects/pipenightdreams/packages/
 
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
-COMMENT=	A puzzle game similar to PipeMania
+COMMENT=	Puzzle game similar to PipeMania
 
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
+
+USE_BZIP2=	yes
+USES=		gmake
 USE_SDL=	image sdl
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
-USE_BZIP2=	yes
-USE_GMAKE=	yes
-CPPFLAGS+=	-I${LOCALBASE}/include
 
-MAN6=		pipenightdreams.6
+CPPFLAGS+=	-I${LOCALBASE}/include -w
+
+PORTDOCS=	AUTHORS ChangeLog NEWS README
+
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS
+
+DESKTOP_ENTRIES="PipeNightDreams" "" ${PORTNAME} \
+		"${PORTNAME}" "Game;LogicGame;" ""
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 
 post-patch:
@@ -31,4 +38,11 @@ post-patch:
 	${REINPLACE_CMD} "s|/usr/share/games|${LOCALBASE}/share|g" \
 		${WRKSRC}/src/main.cpp
 
+post-install:
+	${LN} -sf ${DATADIR}/images/default/splash.png \
+		${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/share/pixmaps/${PORTNAME}.png
+
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${PORTDOCS:S|^|${WRKSRC}/|} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
+
 .include <bsd.port.post.mk>

++++ ./src/hash.cpp	2014-02-01 23:41:06.000000000 +0100
+@@ -55,10 +55,12 @@
+   return(sum % nbuckets);
+ }
+ 
+-Hash::Hash(int bs=256){
++typedef List *ListPtr;
++
++Hash::Hash(int bs){
+  int i;
+  nbuckets=bs;
+- lbuckets=new (List *)[nbuckets];
++ lbuckets=new ListPtr[nbuckets];
+ 
+  for (i=0;i<nbuckets;i++)
+    lbuckets[i]=new List();
+@@ -99,7 +101,7 @@
+   return NotAdded;
+ }
+ 
+-Hash::Result Hash::remove(Str * str, bool del=false){
++Hash::Result Hash::remove(Str * str, bool del){
+   if (str){
+     Index * i;
+     List * list=lbuckets[function(str)];
+@@ -135,7 +137,7 @@
+   return NULL;
+ }
+ 
+-void Hash::empty(bool del=true){
++void Hash::empty(bool del){
+   int i;
+   List * list;
+   for (i=0;i<nbuckets;i++){

+-List::Result List::remove(Index * index, bool del=false){
++List::Result List::remove(Index * index, bool del){
+   if (isEmpty()) return EmptyList;

+

+ }
+ 
+-void List::empty(bool del=true){
++void List::empty(bool del){
+   while (!isEmpty())
+     remove(getFirst(), del);

+-Str::Str(const char * string=NULL){
++Str::Str(const char * string){
+   s=NULL;
+   set(string);
+ }
+@@ -25,7 +25,7 @@

+ }
+ 
+-void Str::set(const char * string=NULL){
++void Str::set(const char * string){
+   if (s) delete[] s;

+     s=new char[strlen(string)+1];
+@@ -71,7 +71,7 @@

+ }
+ 
+-bool Str::isEqual(Str * str, bool case_sensitive = true){
++bool Str::isEqual(Str * str, bool case_sensitive){
+   if (case_sensitive){
+     return (!strcmp(s, str->s));
